title: Bitfarms Achieves 97% Hashrate Growth and Reports Strong Liquidity
text: Bitfarms achieved 97% hashrate growth with operational hashrate reaching 12.8 EH/s for 2024. For full year 2024, company earned 2,914 BTC with expanded operational capacity by 35% to 324 MW. Energy efficiency improved 40% to 21 w/TH for year. Bitfarms reported strong liquidity exceeding $147 million. Company generated approximately $639,200 daily based on year-end Bitcoin pricing. Bitcoin treasury reached substantial value. CEO Ben Gagnon noted 2024 as transformative year for company. Strategic developments continued with pending Stronghold Digital Mining acquisition expected to close in Q1 2025. This largest acquisition between two public Bitcoin mining companies would expand presence significantly with target expansion capacity of up to 1.6 GW approximately 66% in U.S. The Synthetic HODL trading program achieved strong returns contributing to overall financial position. Despite operational successes in hashrate growth and capacity expansion, company faced challenges from industry dynamics and mining profitability pressures that would eventually lead to strategic pivot toward AI infrastructure.
